parsed.production_notes: The video combines human-recorded footage of a man with an AI-generated static image/animation of a robot avatar. The robot's voice is clearly a text-to-speech AI generation, and the split-screen format is a common template for such ads.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, brown complexion, short black hair. He wears wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt with a small pink graphic on the left chest.
characters.demeanor: Curious, engaged, looking down at his phone as if on a video call.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. White/silver metallic face and body with human-like facial features and a blank, neutral expression.

scenes.setting: Plain white wall background for the man, grey studio background for the robot.

panels.panel_visual_description: A female-presenting humanoid robot faces forward against a plain grey background. The robot has a white, smooth metallic face with human-like features and a silver mechanical body. The lighting is even and studio-like. The robot remains mostly static.

A young man sits indoors against a plain white wall. He is holding a smartphone in both hands, looking down at the screen. He wears glasses and a black t-shirt. The lighting is bright and natural. He appears to be interacting with the phone, occasionally speaking.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with a robot avatar on top and a human man on the bottom. The man is looking at his phone, simulating a video call with the robot. Large, dynamic text captions in Gujarati appear across the center of the screen, translating the spoken dialogue. A video call UI overlay with mute, camera, and end call buttons is visible below the robot.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: મારે English શીખવું છે કાલે મારો interview છે. [I want to learn English, I have an interview tomorrow.]
Character B says: English speaking improve કરવું છે એમ ને? [You want to improve your English speaking, right?]
Character A says: હા પણ શું તમે ગુજરાતીમાં સપોર્ટ આપશો મને? [Yes, but will you support me in Gujarati?]
Character B says: હા ચોક્કસ ગુજરાતીમાં જ મદદ કરીશ તમારો ગોલ English શીખવાનો જ છે ને? [Yes, definitely, I will help you in Gujarati. Your goal is to learn English, right?]
Character A says: હા English શીખવાની બહુ ઈચ્છા છે પણ મારી પાસે સમય પણ નથી અને પૈસાની પણ ખેંચ છે શું કરું હવે હું? [Yes, I really want to learn English, but I don't have time and I'm tight on money. What should I do now?]
Character B says: એના માટે જ MySivi એપ છે રોજ ફક્ત 15-20 મિનિટ મારી સાથે પ્રેક્ટિસ કરશો તો 30 દિવસમાં કોન્ફિડન્ટ English બોલી શકશો. [That's what the MySivi app is for. If you practice with me for just 15-20 minutes a day, you will be able to speak confident English in 30 days.]
Character A says: ઓહ પણ આમાં real teacher હશે? [Oh, but will there be a real teacher in this?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
મારે English શીખવું છે કાલે મારો interview છે (I want to learn English, I have an interview tomorrow)
English speaking improve કરવું છે એમ ને? (You want to improve your English speaking, right?)
હા પણ શું તમે ગુજરાતીમાં સપોર્ટ આપશો મને? (Yes, but will you support me in Gujarati?)
હા ચોક્કસ ગુજરાતીમાં જ મદદ કરીશ તમારો ગોલ English શીખવાનો જ છે ને? (Yes, definitely, I will help you in Gujarati. Your goal is to learn English, right?)
હા English શીખવાની બહુ ઈચ્છા છે પણ મારી પાસે સમય પણ નથી અને પૈસાની પણ ખેંચ છે શું કરું હવે હું? (Yes, I really want to learn English, but I don't have time and I'm tight on money. What should I do now?)
એના માટે જ MySivi એપ છે રોજ ફક્ત 15-20 મિનિટ મારી સાથે પ્રેક્ટિસ કરશો તો 30 દિવસમાં કોન્ફિડન્ટ English બોલી શકશો (That's what the MySivi app is for. If you practice with me for just 15-20 minutes a day, you will be able to speak confident English in 30 days.)
ઓહ પણ આમાં real teacher હશે? (Oh, but will there be a real teacher in this?)

panels.panel_visual_description: A blank digital screen. The underlying scene contains no physical characters, props, or environments, as it is entirely composed of digital interface elements.

scenes.visual_description: A full-screen screencast of a mobile application. The UI displays a learning path with various topics like 'Talk about anything' and 'Daily routine'. It then transitions to a chat interface showing a conversation with an AI bot, highlighting grammar corrections.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: આમાં AI based English teachers હશે જે તમને step by step guide કરશે તમારી ભૂલો સુધારશે અને સૌથી મહત્વની વાત-તમને કોઈ જજ નહીં કરે. [There will be AI-based English teachers in this who will guide you step by step, correct your mistakes, and most importantly, no one will judge you.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
આમાં AI based English teachers હશે જે તમને step by step guide કરશે તમારી ભૂલો સુધારશે અને સૌથી મહત્વની વાત-તમને કોઈ જજ નહીં કરે (There will be AI-based English teachers in this who will guide you step by step, correct your mistakes, and most importantly, no one will judge you.)

A young man sits indoors against a plain white wall. He is holding a smartphone in both hands, looking down at the screen. He wears glasses and a black t-shirt. The lighting is bright and natural. He appears to be interacting with the phone, occasionally speaking.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout returns with the robot on top and the man on the bottom. The man speaks, followed by the robot. Large Gujarati captions continue to appear. Briefly, a dark blue app UI popup offering a premium trial overlays the center of the screen before disappearing.
